description_long: This is a medium-sized loaf of bread with a slightly oval, elongated shape and a gently domed top. The crust is a pale golden-brown color, with subtle flour dusting and three shallow diagonal score marks running across the top surface. The texture of the crust appears to be soft and matte, with minimal gloss and a slightly uneven, rustic finish. The ends of the loaf are rounded, and the overall form is plump, suggesting a soft, airy interior typical of white or Italian bread. There are no visible seeds, branding, or packaging, and the loaf appears whole and unsliced.
description: A pale golden-brown, oval loaf of bread with a soft, matte crust and three diagonal score marks on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the loaf, highlighting the three diagonal score marks and the gently domed top.
description_view_1: End view displaying the rounded tip of the loaf and the subtle curvature of the crust.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the loaf's length and the soft, rustic crust texture.
description_view_3: Rear end view focusing on the rounded back of the loaf and the smooth, unsliced surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features three shallow diagonal score marks across the top, with a lightly floured, rustic appearance and no seeds or additional markings.
